ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY; TO COMPEL INSPECTION; AND FOR SANCTIONS. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF DEBRA GARABATO'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY: TO COMPEL INSPECTION; AND FOR SANCTIONS. GRANTED, IN PART. THE INFORMATION SOUGHT PERTAINING TO 2222 YORBA STREET IS REASONABLY CALCULATED TO LEAD TO THE DISCOVERY OF ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE. DEFENDANT'S PRIVACY CONCERNS MAY BE ADDRESSED THROUGH A PROTECTIVE ORDER. DEFENDANT ANGELA OWYANG SHALL SERVE CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NOS. 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 28, 30, WITH DOCUMENTS, WITHIN 20 DAYS. THE SITE INSPECTION 2222 YORBA STREET IS ALLOWED; COUNSEL FOR THE PARTIES SHALL MEET AND CONFER ON A DATE AND PARAMETERS FOR THE INSPECTION. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: AARON MINNIS, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery: To Compel Inspection; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-21-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Conor Granaham, Esq. 415-830-3325 for Plaintiff.
Matthew Suess, Esq. of RMKB 408-947-4887 for Defendant Angela Owyang.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBRA GARABATO's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery: To Compel Inspection; And For Sanctions.

Granted, in part. The information sought pertaining to 2222 Yorba Street is reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. Defendant's privacy concerns may be addressed through a protective order. Defendant Angela Owyang shall serve Code-compliant responses to Requests for Production Nos. 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 28, 30, with documents, within 20 days. The site inspection 2222 Yorba Street is allowed; counsel for the parties shall meet and confer on a date and parameters for the inspection. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
